title: Scalar upwind weights sum to one

source.notes: Structural seed for the scalar positive-velocity upwind update. It records the convex-combination weight identity.

informal.statement: For any real CFL number cfl, the two scalar upwind weights 1 - cfl and cfl sum to 1.
informal.latex: For any \(\lambda\in\mathbb{R}\), the upwind weights satisfy \((1-\lambda)+\lambda=1\).
informal.expected_conclusion: The two scalar upwind weights sum to one.

tasks.input: Translate the scalar upwind weight-sum identity into Lean 4.
Given the theorem statement, complete the Lean 4 proof.
